title: Update mAadhaar and Xiaomi Home sidebar link URLs

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/data/defaultLinks.ts`, update the URL of the 'mAadhaar' entry in the SERVICES category to 'https://uidai.gov.in/en/' and update the URL of the 'Xiaomi Home' entry in the SERVICES category to 'http://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.xiaomi.smarthome&hl=en_IN'. Both links must continue to open in a new tab.
acceptanceCriteria: The mAadhaar entry in the SERVICES category of defaultLinks.ts has its URL set to 'https://uidai.gov.in/en/'.
The Xiaomi Home entry in the SERVICES category of defaultLinks.ts has its URL set to 'http://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.xiaomi.smarthome&hl=en_IN'.
Clicking the mAadhaar link in the sidebar opens 'https://uidai.gov.in/en/' in a new tab.
Clicking the Xiaomi Home link in the sidebar opens 'http://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.xiaomi.smarthome&hl=en_IN' in a new tab.
No other default links are modified.

constraints: Only update the URL fields for mAadhaar and Xiaomi Home entries in frontend/src/data/defaultLinks.ts — do not change their names, icons, categories, or any other properties.
Do not modify any files in the immutable paths list.
nonGoals: Changing any other existing link URLs.
